description: Compare external template repos (e.g. shadcn-io-mirror) against Sajtmaskin TCH: package.json engines, .node-version, config/prompt-static/01-tech-stack.md

paths.comment: Default: folder sibling to sajtmaskin (not inside git). Override: --root or SHADCN_MIRROR_REPOS. _template_refs/ is gitignored if placed under repo — do not commit hundreds of clones.
